title: midnight-craving saudi-arabian ghee tagine
description: A rich, sugar-free-friendly, and aromatic tagine featuring ghee, perfect for a midnight craving. It's a unique fusion of traditional Saudi Arabian flavors, carefully crafted to satisfy your late-night cravings.

ingredients.name: Ghee
ingredients.notes: use high-quality, pure ghee for the best flavor

instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the ghee over medium heat until it starts to melt and becomes fragrant.
Add 1 cup of all-purpose flour and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture turns golden brown and develops a nutty aroma.
Gradually add in 1 cup of water, whisking continuously to avoid lumps, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
Stir in 1 teaspoon of ground cinnamon, 1/2 teaspoon of ground cardamom, and 1/4 teaspoon of ground nutmeg for added warmth and depth of flavor.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
Garnish with fresh parsley or mint leaves, if desired.
Serve warm, straight from the saucepan, and enjoy!
For an extra-special touch, you can add some chopped nuts or dried fruits on top of the tagine before serving.
If you prefer a thicker tagine, you can add a little more flour or cook it for a longer period.
You can also adjust the amount of spices to your liking, feel free to experiment and find your perfect balance.
For a more intense flavor, you can cook the tagine for a longer period or add more ghee.
Remember to always use caution when working with hot saucepans and to adjust the heat as needed to prevent burning.
Feel free to get creative and add your own twist to this recipe, the possibilities are endless!
